# ── REMOVED (65→40 sources) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# fanboy-complete.txt — CRITICAL: includes EasyList + Fanboy Annoyances + Fanboy Social,
#   bypasses our curated annoyances/social categories, smuggles in aggressive rules!
# fanboy-ultimate.txt — same as above but even more aggressive
# easylist-downloads.adblockplus.org/*+easylist.txt (10 URLs) — combined variants
#   that include full EasyList again (already included separately); only standalone
#   regional additions kept
# cdn.adblockcdn.com/easylist_lite.txt — lite subset, already have full EasyList
# austinheap/sophos-xg-block-lists/easylist.txt — just a mirror of EasyList
# ublockorigin.github.io/thirdparties/easylist.txt — just a mirror of EasyList
# filters.adtidy.org/ublock/2_optimized — optimized duplicate of filter_2
# filters.adtidy.org/ublock/2_without_easylist — partial duplicate
# filters.adtidy.org/ublock/101_optimized — optimized duplicate
# gurud.ee/ab.txt — small personal Estonian list
# kowith337/PersonalFilterListCollection/facebook/FacebookCommands — personal niche
# nfer/easylistchina_it — personal fork
# DandelionSprout/ExtremelyCondensedList — "extremely" in name, aggressive approach
# deathbybandaid/piholeparser/* (4 URLs) — PiHole-parsed duplicates of EasyList regional
# tomasko126/filters_ublock — duplicate variant with ublock tweaks
# easylist-downloads.adblockplus.org/latvianlist+easylist — combined duplicate
